parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        XSAL.XSAL_0        AS code_salarie,
        XSAL.XMAT_0        AS matricule,
        XSAL.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom,
        XSAL.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom,
        XSAL.XEMAIL_0      AS email,
        XSAL.YTELE_0       AS telephone,
        XSAL.YSUP_0        AS code_superieur,
        XSAL.CREDATTIM_0   AS date_creation,
        XSAL.YDATECTRL_0   AS date_controle,
        XSAL.CREUSR_0      AS user_createur,
        YSALAUS.XSAL_0     AS code_createur,
        CRE.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_createur,
        CRE.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_createur,
        CRE.XEMAIL_0       AS email_createur,
        CRE.YTELE_0        AS tel_createur,
        CRE.YSUP_0         AS sup_createur,
        SUP.XSAL_0         AS code_sup_createur,
        SUP.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_sup_createur,
        SUP.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_sup_createur,
        SUP.XEMAIL_0       AS email_sup_createur,
        SUP.YTELE_0        AS tel_sup_createur,
        pdg.XSAL_0         AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0       AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0        AS telephone_pdg,
        dga.XSAL_0         AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0       AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0        AS telephone_dga,
        farhat.XSAL_0      AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0   AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0   AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0    AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0     AS telephone_farhat,
        baallah.XSAL_0     AS code_baallah,
        baallah.XNAMSAL_0  AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0  AS prenom_baallah,
        baallah.XEMAIL_0   AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0    AS telephone_baallah,
        -- IA : salarié
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,
        -- IA : supérieur du créateur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)  AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)  AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)  AS bot_superieur,
        -- IA : PDG (chat_id fixe)
        '8528101210'           AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,
        -- IA : DGA
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS bot_dga,
        -- IA : FARHAT
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS bot_farhat,
        -- IA : BAALLAH
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATECTRL_0 != '1753-01-01' THEN XSAL.YDATECTRL_0
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XSAL.CREDATTIM_0)
        END AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, XSAL.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATECTRL_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), XSAL.YDATECTRL_0)
            ELSE 
                DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XSAL.CREDATTIM_0))
        END AS jours_restants,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATECTRL_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, XSAL.CREDATTIM_0, XSAL.YDATECTRL_0) / 2
            ELSE 
                CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2
        END AS seuil_dga
    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS YSALAUS ON YSALAUS.USER_0 = XSAL.CREUSR_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE ON CRE.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP ON SUP.XSAL_0 = CRE.YSUP_0
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELYAE') P
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066') pdg
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949') dga
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602') farhat
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179') baallah
    WHERE 
        XSAL.XCAT_0 = 4
        AND XSAL.CREDATTIM_0 >= '2024-01-01'
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT A
            WHERE XSAL.XSAL_0 = A.IDENT1_0 AND A.ABREV_0 = 'YAE'
        )
)
SELECT *, 'SALARIE' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT' FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 8 AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH' FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA' FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG' FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2
ORDER BY jours_restants ASC;
